title: Personal User - update for headset is present
scenario: Firmware update notification appears on Home Screen for outdated firmware; tapping update completes DFU process successfully
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Ensure a Poly Bluetooth audio device (e.g., Poly Voyager Focus 2) is connected to the Android device via Bluetooth.
3. Verify the connected device has outdated firmware (e.g., firmware version older than the latest available).
4. Observe the Home Screen of the Poly Studio Mobile app.
5. Confirm that a firmware update notification is displayed on the Home Screen.
6. Tap the update button within the firmware update notification.
7. Follow the on-screen prompts to initiate and complete the Device Firmware Update (DFU) process.
8. Wait for the DFU process to finish successfully.
expected: A Personal User (logged in or as Guest) sees a firmware update notification on the Home Screen when a connected device has outdated firmware. Tapping the update button successfully completes the Device Firmware Update (DFU) process.
